# Screenshots

Add screenshots here for use in README.md

## Naming Convention

Use descriptive names:
- `settings-api.png` - API settings page
- `settings-widget.png` - Widget settings page
- `checkout-button.png` - Locker selection button on checkout
- `locker-map-popup.png` - Locker selection map in popup mode
- `locker-map-embedded.png` - Locker selection map in embedded mode
- `order-meta.png` - Order meta box with locker details
- `admin-order-actions.png` - Admin order actions

## Usage in README

Reference screenshots using relative paths:

```markdown
![Settings Page](.github/assets/screenshots/settings-api.png)
```

## Image Specifications

**Recommended:**
- Format: PNG or JPG
- Max width: 1200px
- Optimize before committing (use TinyPNG or similar)
- Keep file size under 500KB per image

## Included in Production

These screenshots are included in the master branch so they display correctly in both develop and master README files.
